ToolboxElements.Name: PowerShell Script
ToolboxElements.Description: Runs a PowerShell script file with optional arguments.

ToolboxElements.Name: Python Script
ToolboxElements.Description: Runs a Python script with optional arguments.

ToolboxElements.Name: Node.js Script
ToolboxElements.Description: Runs a Node.js script with optional arguments.

ToolboxElements.Name: Executable
ToolboxElements.Description: Runs an executable file with optional arguments.

ToolboxElements.Name: Batch XCopy File (Overwrite)
ToolboxElements.Description: Copies a file with xcopy and overwrites existing targets.

ToolboxElements.Name: Batch Move File (Overwrite)
ToolboxElements.Description: Moves a file and overwrites the target if it already exists.
